urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: US soldier killed and one injured after Iranian attack in Iraq
latest.summary: The US military reported that a service member was killed during a controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian drone in northern Iraq. This incident occurred a day after an attack on a base in Jordan resulted in two US soldiers' deaths and one missing.
latest.details: The US military reported that a service member was killed during a controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian drone in northern Iraq. This incident occurred a day after an attack on a base in Jordan resulted in two US soldiers' deaths and one missing. US Central Command stated that the death toll for American personnel in the ongoing conflict has now reached 17. Meanwhile, Iranian media reported that a nuclear power plant under construction was struck, and the UN's nuclear watchdog has called for restraint.
latest.full_brief: The US military reported that a service member was killed during a controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian drone in northern Iraq. This incident occurred a day after an attack on a base in Jordan resulted in two US soldiers' deaths and one missing. US Central Command stated that the death toll for American personnel in the ongoing conflict has now reached 17. Meanwhile, Iranian media reported that a nuclear power plant under construction was struck, and the UN's nuclear watchdog has called for restraint.

latest.title: Kodak EC35 is a dirt-cheap point-and-shoot film camera
latest.summary: Reto Project is launching the Kodak EC35, a budget-friendly 35mm film camera priced at $34.99. The camera features a 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and a manual wind and rewind mechanism.
latest.details: Reto Project is launching the Kodak EC35, a budget-friendly 35mm film camera priced at $34.99. The camera features a 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and a manual wind and rewind mechanism. It is designed for simplicity, lacking advanced features like double exposure or zone focusing. The EC35 is available in various colors, including butter yellow and avocado green, with contrasting lens covers.
latest.full_brief: Reto Project is launching the Kodak EC35, a budget-friendly 35mm film camera priced at $34.99. The camera features a 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and a manual wind and rewind mechanism. It is designed for simplicity, lacking advanced features like double exposure or zone focusing. The EC35 is available in various colors, including butter yellow and avocado green, with contrasting lens covers.

latest.title: Ferry carrying 133 passengers and crew sinks off Guyana coast
latest.summary: The MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana, carrying 116 passengers and 17 crew members. So far, 67 individuals have been rescued, including 15 children, while many others remain missing.
latest.details: The MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana, carrying 116 passengers and 17 crew members. So far, 67 individuals have been rescued, including 15 children, while many others remain missing. The ferry was on its way to Port Kaituma when it capsized, prompting a search operation involving government and private vessels. The boat was reportedly within its weight capacity and equipped with life jackets and lifeboats.
latest.full_brief: The MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana, carrying 116 passengers and 17 crew members. So far, 67 individuals have been rescued, including 15 children, while many others remain missing. The ferry was on its way to Port Kaituma when it capsized, prompting a search operation involving government and private vessels. The boat was reportedly within its weight capacity and equipped with life jackets and lifeboats.

latest.title: Australia’s life dissatisfaction levels double as ‘wellbeing poverty’ reaches new highs
latest.summary: Recent data indicates that life dissatisfaction levels in Australia have doubled, with nearly 2.2 million Australians living below the wellbeing poverty line. In 2025, approximately 9.7% of Australians rated their life satisfaction at four or below out of ten.
latest.details: Recent data indicates that life dissatisfaction levels in Australia have doubled, with nearly 2.2 million Australians living below the wellbeing poverty line. In 2025, approximately 9.7% of Australians rated their life satisfaction at four or below out of ten. This dissatisfaction has been linked to the ongoing effects of the Covid pandemic and rising living costs. The data also reveals a significant correlation between low life satisfaction and feelings of alienation within communities.
latest.full_brief: Recent data indicates that life dissatisfaction levels in Australia have doubled, with nearly 2.2 million Australians living below the wellbeing poverty line. In 2025, approximately 9.7% of Australians rated their life satisfaction at four or below out of ten. This dissatisfaction has been linked to the ongoing effects of the Covid pandemic and rising living costs. The data also reveals a significant correlation between low life satisfaction and feelings of alienation within communities.

latest.title: Australian and NZ safety assurances about asbestos in play sand were based on supplier’s own…
latest.summary: Concerns have arisen regarding asbestos contamination in play sand products, leading to recalls across Australia and New Zealand. The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) based its initial safety assurances on an unverified assessment from the supplier.
latest.details: Concerns have arisen regarding asbestos contamination in play sand products, leading to recalls across Australia and New Zealand. The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) based its initial safety assurances on an unverified assessment from the supplier. Recent testing revealed that a significant percentage of the sand released asbestos when disturbed. The New Zealand workplace regulator has consistently challenged the safety claims made by Australian authorities.
latest.full_brief: Concerns have arisen regarding asbestos contamination in play sand products, leading to recalls across Australia and New Zealand. The Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC) based its initial safety assurances on an unverified assessment from the supplier. Recent testing revealed that a significant percentage of the sand released asbestos when disturbed. The New Zealand workplace regulator has consistently challenged the safety claims made by Australian authorities.

latest.title: Runners complete 'world's coolest marathon' on drifting North Pole ice
latest.summary: A unique marathon event took place at the geographic North Pole, attracting 23 runners from seven different countries. Participants ran on drifting sea ice, completing laps of a 1,055-meter loop while wearing thermal gear and life vests.
latest.details: A unique marathon event took place at the geographic North Pole, attracting 23 runners from seven different countries. Participants ran on drifting sea ice, completing laps of a 1,055-meter loop while wearing thermal gear and life vests. Denmark's Rikke Dam and China's Wang Shengxian emerged as the winners in the women's and men's categories, respectively. Organizers noted that the course disappeared shortly after the event concluded due to the shifting ice.
latest.full_brief: A unique marathon event took place at the geographic North Pole, attracting 23 runners from seven different countries. Participants ran on drifting sea ice, completing laps of a 1,055-meter loop while wearing thermal gear and life vests. Denmark's Rikke Dam and China's Wang Shengxian emerged as the winners in the women's and men's categories, respectively. Organizers noted that the course disappeared shortly after the event concluded due to the shifting ice.

latest.title: Government use of automated AI decision-making to be curbed under new Australian rules
latest.summary: The Albanese government is developing new rules to regulate the use of automated AI decision-making in federal departments. This initiative aims to ensure safety, fairness, accuracy, and transparency in AI processes.
latest.details: The Albanese government is developing new rules to regulate the use of automated AI decision-making in federal departments. This initiative aims to ensure safety, fairness, accuracy, and transparency in AI processes. The attorney general, Michelle Rowland, is leading the effort, which coincides with a push for digital duty of care legislation. The government plans to establish a new office of AI to manage the implications of AI technology.
latest.full_brief: The Albanese government is developing new rules to regulate the use of automated AI decision-making in federal departments. This initiative aims to ensure safety, fairness, accuracy, and transparency in AI processes. The attorney general, Michelle Rowland, is leading the effort, which coincides with a push for digital duty of care legislation. The government plans to establish a new office of AI to manage the implications of AI technology.

latest.title: Dozens missing after passenger ferry sinks off coast of Guyana
latest.summary: The MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana, leading to a massive search-and-rescue operation. The vessel was certified to carry 397 passengers and was transporting 268 tonnes of cargo at the time of the incident.
latest.details: The MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana, leading to a massive search-and-rescue operation. The vessel was certified to carry 397 passengers and was transporting 268 tonnes of cargo at the time of the incident. Preliminary investigations suggest that the sinking was related to tidal conditions rather than mechanical failure. The search area has been expanded significantly, and local fishermen are assisting in the rescue efforts.
latest.full_brief: The MV Barima ferry sank off the coast of Guyana, leading to a massive search-and-rescue operation. The vessel was certified to carry 397 passengers and was transporting 268 tonnes of cargo at the time of the incident. Preliminary investigations suggest that the sinking was related to tidal conditions rather than mechanical failure. The search area has been expanded significantly, and local fishermen are assisting in the rescue efforts.

latest.title: Thames Water lenders preparing legal challenge in event of Burnham nationalisation
latest.summary: Burnham, who will become Prime Minister on Monday, has expressed a desire for greater public control over the water and energy sectors. Thames Water's lenders have proposed a deal to write off nearly half of the company's debt and inject new cash, but the government has rejected this proposal.
latest.details: Burnham, who will become Prime Minister on Monday, has expressed a desire for greater public control over the water and energy sectors. Thames Water's lenders have proposed a deal to write off nearly half of the company's debt and inject new cash, but the government has rejected this proposal. In the event of nationalisation, creditors plan to pursue full payment of outstanding debts, potentially resulting in a multi-billion-pound bill for the government. The Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs has stated that the government is prepared for any eventuality regarding Thames Water's future.
latest.full_brief: Burnham, who will become Prime Minister on Monday, has expressed a desire for greater public control over the water and energy sectors. Thames Water's lenders have proposed a deal to write off nearly half of the company's debt and inject new cash, but the government has rejected this proposal. In the event of nationalisation, creditors plan to pursue full payment of outstanding debts, potentially resulting in a multi-billion-pound bill for the government. The Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs has stated that the government is prepared for any eventuality regarding Thames Water's future.

latest.title: Earthquake in Peru leaves at least six dead
latest.summary: A 5.5-magnitude earthquake struck the Andes region of Peru, resulting in at least six fatalities. The earthquake occurred on Saturday at 9.24pm, with its epicentre located near the city of Sicaya in Huancayo province.
latest.details: A 5.5-magnitude earthquake struck the Andes region of Peru, resulting in at least six fatalities. The earthquake occurred on Saturday at 9.24pm, with its epicentre located near the city of Sicaya in Huancayo province. Over 30 individuals were injured, and approximately 300 people have been displaced due to the collapse of several buildings. The local civil defence office noted that the use of rustic adobe materials in construction contributed to the extent of the damage.
latest.full_brief: A 5.5-magnitude earthquake struck the Andes region of Peru, resulting in at least six fatalities. The earthquake occurred on Saturday at 9.24pm, with its epicentre located near the city of Sicaya in Huancayo province. Over 30 individuals were injured, and approximately 300 people have been displaced due to the collapse of several buildings. The local civil defence office noted that the use of rustic adobe materials in construction contributed to the extent of the damage.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.
